desc: Translate selected elements by an explicit (dx, dy, dz) vector supplied in millimetres.
summary: Translate selected elements by an explicit (dx, dy, dz) vector supplied in millimetres. Inline default = (0, 0, 0).
usecase: "Shift selection by 200 mm +Z" style moves from Bot or UI.
notfor: Space-aware moves (use IntoDetectedSpace). View-axis directional moves (use DirectionalByViewAxis).
precondition: Active document. ≥1 element resolved. Vector non-zero.
postcondition: Each element translated by the vector. Audit entry written.
logictree: 1) Resolve element ids and (dx,dy,dz) mm. 2) Validate. 3) Convert mm → ft. 4) Transaction: MoveElement per id. 5) Commit, log. 6) Failure → WireFault + rollback.
